name: Maildev
tagline: MailDev is a simple way to test your project's generated email during development, with an easy to use web interface that runs on your machine built on top of
description:
MailDev is a simple way to test your project's generated email during development, with an easy to use web interface that runs on your machine built on top of


_Template derived from caprover/one-click-apps (caprover@bd357c9, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  maildev:
    image: maildev/maildev:2.1.0
    volumes:
      - maildev-data:/data
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MAILDEV_SMTP_PORT: 1025
      MAILDEV_MAIL_DIRECTORY: /data
      MAILDEV_WEB_USER: admin
      MAILDEV_WEB_PASS: efbbf896
      MAILDEV_IP: '::'
    ports:
      - 42063:1080
volumes:
  maildev-data: null
